data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Artsy and Artnet/
data.description: Artsy and Artnet, two prominent platforms in the art world, have partnered to revolutionize the industry's future. The joint venture, announced on 15-Apr-2026 by Artsy and Artnet via PR Newswire, marks a significant collaboration. The move signifies a shift towards new leadership rather than ownership dynamics, showcasing a strategic vision to drive change. This alliance is expected to impact the online art sector by leveraging the strengths of both entities. The partnership aims to capitalize on Artsy and Artnet's combined expertise to shape the industry's direction moving forward.

data.title: Robots & Pencils Goes All in on AWS with Appointment of Adrian Bird as Vice President of AWS Partnership
data.description: Bird, with over 20 years of experience in alliance leadership and five years at AWS, has joined forces with AWS to enhance co-sell engagement and broaden enterprise AI delivery. The collaboration aims to leverage Bird's expertise to drive growth in these areas. This strategic move was announced in Cleveland on April 15, 2026. Robots & Pencils, recognized for their rapid AI engineering solutions, look forward to the opportunities this partnership brings.

data.title: V2 Jets Appoints Alden Lebov and Andrew Hauptman as Managing Partners
data.description: V2 Jets, a private aviation brokerage based in Boca Raton, Florida, is emphasizing continued growth and enhanced client-focused services through a recent leadership expansion. The company, recognized for its consultation-based private travel solutions, shared news of the strategic move on April 15, 2026. The expansion aims to boost the organization's capabilities and provide a more personalized experience for clients.

China's Foreign Minister Wang Yi holds a call with Iran's Foreign Minister. China backs Iran in safeguarding its national dignity, and supports ceasefire and negotiation momentum - CCTV.

data.title: Automated bot always bets 'No' on Polymarket, proving a valid strategy for non-sports markets.
data.description: The 'Nothing Ever Happens' bot, created by Sterling Crispin, is programmed to purchase "No" on any non-sports Polymarket it encounters. This automated bot's strategy may seem unconventional, but it operates systematically based on its programming.

data.title: Proposal EIP-8105 introduces an encrypted mempool for Ethereum, aiming to reduce MEV and protect transaction payloads.
data.description: The EIP-8105 introduces a new proposal for Ethereum, suggesting an encrypted mempool that is not tied to any specific scheme. This feature is designed to conceal transaction payloads until they are included, aiming to decrease any harmful MEV issues.

data.title: UK regulator asks for feedback on crypto rules ahead of 2027 launch, covering stablecoins, trading, staking.
data.description: The financial regulatory body in the UK has initiated a consultation regarding regulations on cryptocurrencies, specifically focusing on stablecoins, trading practices, and staking methods. This move precedes the implementation of a comprehensive crypto regulatory framework projected to become effective in 2027.

data.title: Atlanta Facial Plastic Surgeon Dr. Benjamin Stong Highlights Advanced Deep Plane Facelift Technique Using Platysma Elevation and Extended Myotomies
data.description: In Atlanta, Dr. Benjamin Stong, a prominent facial plastic surgeon, is emphasizing cutting-edge techniques in deep plane facelift procedures. These advanced methods incorporate platysma elevation and extended myotomies to enhance neck contour, redefine the jawline, and improve the cervicomental angle as part of facial rejuvenation surgery. The procedures aim to provide more comprehensive results for patients seeking facial enhancement. Dr. Stong's practice in Atlanta is at the forefront of this innovative approach to facelift surgery. The noteworthy techniques have garnered attention in the medical community.

data.title: MAHLE Improves Operating Results in 2025
data.description: Despite facing difficult conditions and incurring substantial restructuring costs, the group managed to report positive results. Sales decreased to €11.3 billion primarily due to currency fluctuations and asset sales. However, productivity, adjusted EBIT, and equity ratio all saw improvements. Additionally, net debt decreased, ensuring liquidity. CEO Arnd Franz stated that MAHLE is on a positive trajectory.
There are no plans to cease fire with Lebanon - Jerusalem Post, citing an Israeli source.

data.title: Wall Street Giant Morgan Stanley Turns Volatility Into Strong Gains
data.description: Morgan Stanley (NYSE: MS) announced its first-quarter 2026 earnings, reporting $3.43 per share, an increase from $2.60 per share the previous year, surpassing the expected $3.00 per share. Net earnings rose to $5.57 billion from $4.32 billion. The banking giant's revenue also saw significant growth, reaching $20.58 billion, a 16% surge year-over-year, exceeding the projected $19.724 billion. The increased provision for credit losses in this quarter resulted from individual assessments on specific commercial real estate loans amid rising macroeconomic uncertainty. The firm's expense efficiency ratio improved to 65% from 68% compared to the previous year. Morgan Stanley's return on tangible common equity for the first quarter stood at 27.1%, a rise from 23.0% in the prior year. The robust revenue growth was primarily driven by market activity, with Institutional Securities achieving a record net revenue of $10.7 billion, propelled by strong performance in the Markets business segment.

data.title: ASML Lifts 2026 Outlook As AI Demand Strains Chip Capacity
data.description: ASML Holding NV (NASDAQ: ASML) announced better-than-expected first-quarter results and raised its 2026 guidance. The company is showing significant growth in its EUV segment and anticipates growth in its non-EUV business in the same year. Analyst Alexander Duval from Goldman Sachs reaffirmed a Buy rating and set a price target of €1,450 ($1,709). ASML reported revenues and EBIT above consensus, indicating strong performance. Orders are robust, driven by increasing demand in semiconductor industry, particularly in AI infrastructure investment. Market demand for advanced Logic/Memory is high with memory production capacity nearly fully reserved. The full news is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: fullthrottle.ai® Partners With TelevisaUnivision to Bring Premium Multicultural and National Inventory Into Its Self-Service Platform
data.description: A recent partnership has broadened the availability of high-quality Spanish-language digital and CTV inventory for marketers, allowing them to streamline the planning, execution, and evaluation of multicultural campaigns within a single cohesive platform. The collaboration, announced on April 15, 2026, in Philadelphia, opens up new opportunities for reaching diverse audiences. This development comes from fullthrottle.ai®, a cutting-edge leader specializing in first-party data solutions.

data.title: Product Connections Rebrands as PCX to Accelerate Retail Activation
data.description: In Bentonville, Arkansas on April 15, 2026, PCX was unveiled as the new identity for Product Connections, signaling a shift towards being a swifter, activation-focused marketing ally suited for modern retail landscapes. This change is in response to the accelerated pace of retail schedules and the extended paths customers take, where a more agile approach is essential.
